title: cyrtomium aequibasis
intro: Cyrtomium aequibasis, also known as the Chinese fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in China, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral activities. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving headaches, and improving digestion, as well as having antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. Cyrtomium aequibasis is often prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its extracts are also used in traditional Chinese medicine.
